boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment or vendor-master action when tax ID and master alias link resolve name variation
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: tax ID and vendor master alias link resolved

critical_features_preserved: tax ID and vendor master alias link
final_answer: Action may proceed. Current control record SRC-94F130263D7B-CTL confirms tax ID and vendor master alias link is exact and tied to the request. Policy requires execution only when source boundary closes; it does. Name variation alone creates no authority defect.
